mapper.insert: insert into nx_community_dispatch_driver_duty (nx_cdd_community_id, nx_cdd_driver_user_id, nx_cdd_route_date, nx_cdd_status, nx_cdd_checked_in_at, nx_cdd_checked_out_at) values (#{nxCddCommunityId}, #{nxCddDriverUserId}, #{nxCddRouteDate}, #{nxCddStatus}, #{nxCddCheckedInAt}, #{nxCddCheckedOutAt})

insert into nx_community_dispatch_driver_duty (nx_cdd_community_id, nx_cdd_driver_user_id, nx_cdd_route_date, nx_cdd_status, nx_cdd_checked_in_at, nx_cdd_checked_out_at) values (#{nxCddCommunityId}, #{nxCddDriverUserId}, #{nxCddRouteDate}, #{nxCddStatus}, #{nxCddCheckedInAt}, #{nxCddCheckedOutAt}) on duplicate key update nx_cdd_status = values(nx_cdd_status), nx_cdd_checked_in_at = coalesce(nx_cdd_checked_in_at, values(nx_cdd_checked_in_at)), nx_cdd_checked_out_at = null

insert into nx_community_dispatch_driver_duty (nx_cdd_community_id, nx_cdd_driver_user_id, nx_cdd_route_date, nx_cdd_status, nx_cdd_checked_in_at, nx_cdd_checked_out_at) values (#{nxCddCommunityId}, #{nxCddDriverUserId}, #{nxCddRouteDate}, #{nxCddStatus}, #{nxCddCheckedInAt}, #{nxCddCheckedOutAt}) on duplicate key update nx_cdd_status = values(nx_cdd_status), nx_cdd_checked_out_at = values(nx_cdd_checked_out_at)
